name: magick-ai/magick-ai-core
description: WordPress AI operation governance layer for ability intake, proposals, approval boundaries, and audit logs.

scripts.package:release: rm -rf build/magick-ai-core build/magick-ai-core.zip && mkdir -p build && rsync -a --delete --exclude-from=.distignore ./ build/magick-ai-core/ && cd build && zip -qr magick-ai-core.zip magick-ai-core
scripts.plugin-check:release: WP_PATH="${WP_PATH:-/Users/muze/Local Sites/magick-ai/app/public}"; WP_CLI_BIN="${WP_CLI_BIN:-/tmp/wp-cli.phar}"; WP_CLI_PHP="${WP_CLI_PHP:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/lightning-services/php-8.5.3+1/bin/darwin-arm64/bin/php}"; SOCKET="${WP_DB_SOCKET:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/run/NPb24Zg9g/mysql/mysqld.sock}"; "$WP_CLI_PHP" -d display_errors=0 -d error_reporting=8191 -d mysqli.default_socket="$SOCKET" "$WP_CLI_BIN" --path="$WP_PATH" --no-color plugin check magick-ai-core --format=table --exclude-directories=tests,.git,.github,.sisyphus,.workbuddy,vendor,node_modules,build,dist,docs,examples,sj --exclude-files=.DS_Store,.gitignore,.distignore,AGENTS.md,README.md,composer.json,composer.lock,phpcs.xml,phpcs.xml.dist,phpstan.neon,phpstan.neon.dist
